title: Refund
description: Per-tenant refund root record. Carries `tenant_id` — cascades application through tenant per hierarchy.md §2. NEVER carries `application_id`, `region_id`, `organization_id`, `branch_id`, `scope_node_id`. IMMUTABLE post-succeeded (RefundObserver refuses mutation).

refund_number.description: Sequential per tenant per year: `REF-2026-00000001`. Generated by RefundNumberGenerator. Unique per (tenant_id, refund_number).

payment_id.description: Parent payment being refunded. RESTRICT — payment cannot be deleted while refunds reference it.

invoice_id.description: Parent invoice. Must match payment.invoice_id. RESTRICT.

credit_note_id.description: Populated when FinalizeRefundJob creates the reversal credit note. NULL until succeeded. RESTRICT.

transaction_id.description: Populated when FinalizeRefundJob records the offsetting transaction. NULL until succeeded. RESTRICT.

amount_cents.description: Refund amount in cents. Positive integer. Must be <= payment.amount_cents - payment.amount_refunded_cents (remaining refundable).

currency.description: ISO 4217. Matches payment.currency unless refund_multi_currency entitlement is on.

reason.description: Enum: customer_requested / product_not_received / product_unacceptable / duplicate_charge / fraud_confirmed / subscription_cancelled / admin_correction / chargeback_prevention / regulator_required / accounting_correction.

reason_note.description: Customer-visible reason description + admin-visible detail. Redacted rendering strips admin-only portions for non-privileged readers.

status.description: Enum: pending / awaiting_approval / approved / processing / succeeded / failed / cancelled / provider_error / rejected.

rejection_reason.description: Customer-visible rejection explanation. Required when transitioning to rejected.

provider.description: Enum: stripe / paddle / adyen / square / paypal / custom_webhook. Copied from parent payment.provider at creation.

provider_reference_id.description: Provider-native refund ID (Stripe re_..., Paddle refund_id, etc.). Populated after InitiateProviderRefundJob dispatches successfully.

provider_fee_reversal_cents.description: Some providers reverse fees on refund (Stripe keeps the ~2.9% fee for standard refunds; Paddle Billing returns it for cancellations within 60 days). Populated by provider response.

processed_at.description: Populated on transition to succeeded. NULL until then.

failed_at.description: Populated on transition to failed. NULL until then.

provider_metadata.description: Provider-specific response metadata. Confidential — refunds.view-financials permission required.

initiated_by_user_id.description: Admin or customer who initiated the refund. Required.

metadata.description: Freeform tenant-writable metadata. Confidential portions (bank_transfer_details, check_details, approval_notes) are encrypted at rest via TokenEncryptor.

indexes.name: refunds_tenant_pending_approvals_idx
indexes.predicate: requires_approval = true AND status = 'awaiting_approval' AND deleted_at IS NULL

x-invariants: amount_cents > 0 AND amount_cents <= parent payment.amount_cents - payment.amount_refunded_cents
currency matches parent payment.currency UNLESS tenant holds refund_multi_currency entitlement
refund_type='partial' requires tenant to hold refund_partial entitlement + at least one refund_line
refund_type='prorated' requires tenant to hold refund_prorated entitlement + parent invoice.applied_to_type='membership' + at least one refund_line with proration_config
refund_type='full' allows zero refund_lines (all-in-one refund of the whole payment)
SUM(refund_lines.amount_cents) == refund.amount_cents (when refund_lines exist)
credit_note_id + transaction_id populated ONLY when status='succeeded' (FinalizeRefundJob populates)
approved_by_user_id != initiated_by_user_id (segregation of duties per SOX §404 — REFUND_SELF_APPROVAL_REFUSED)
rejected_by_user_id != initiated_by_user_id (same rule)
status='rejected' requires rejected_by_user_id + rejected_at + rejection_reason set
status='cancelled' requires cancelled_by_user_id (metadata.cancelled_by) + cancelled_at (metadata.cancelled_at)
status='failed' requires failed_at + failure_reason set
status='succeeded' requires processed_at + credit_note_id + transaction_id set
state transitions must follow the one-way state machine (see readme.md §5)
refund_number is IMMUTABLE post-create
amount_cents / currency / reason / refund_type / payment_id / invoice_id are IMMUTABLE post-status != 'awaiting_approval' (REFUND_TERMS_LOCKED)
ALL fields IMMUTABLE post-status='succeeded' (REFUND_IMMUTABLE)
provider is FROZEN at creation (copied from parent payment.provider — never re-resolved)
auto-approve reasons (duplicate_charge) force requires_approval=false at creation

always-approve reasons (fraud_confirmed / admin_correction / chargeback_prevention / regulator_required / accounting_correction) force requires_approval=true at creation regardless of amount / staleness thresholds
customer-allowed reasons only accepted from POST /refunds/mine (admin path may use any reason)
